$comment: v1 is locked. Breaking changes require v2 namespace. v1-unification (S1.5.1, R2) extends event type from a fixed enum to a namespace pattern: reserved AgentLens core namespaces keep their fixed event-name enum; skill and importer namespaces (kws-*, claude.*, codex.*, etc.) accept any lower-case dotted token.
title: agentlens.event.v1

allOf.$comment: General namespace pattern: <namespace>.<event> in lower-kebab/snake. At least one dot required; segments start with a lower-case letter.

Reserved AgentLens core namespaces must use the locked event-name enum. AgentRunway (agentrunway.*), neutral example namespaces (example.*), and importer namespaces (claude.*, codex.*) are intentionally not constrained beyond the general pattern.
